title: IT Business Analyst & Project Manager
description:
About the Team

Deeeplabs’ Digital Cloud Transformation vision is to create meaningful relationships with our clients by powering the next generation digital enterprise.

We work with clients to design and deliver secure, scalable, and cost-efficient data, applications, and AI solutions across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments. Our multidisciplinary teams, including Business Analysts, Project Managers, Data Engineers, and AI Specialists are the hands-on experts who make these strategies a reality.

Role: Business Analyst & Project Manager

As a Business Analyst & Project Manager, you will be responsible for bridging business needs and technology delivery in the data, apps, and AI space. You will work closely with customers, architects, developers, and other stakeholders to elicit requirements, manage backlogs, and lead Agile delivery. This includes facilitating ceremonies, managing project timelines, coaching customers on Agile practices, and ensuring successful implementation of secure, scalable data, application, and AI solutions.

Responsibilities

  • Elicit, analyse, and document business requirements by working closely with customers, stakeholders, and technical teams
  • Drive user story creation, including Definition of Done (DoD), prioritisation, and acceptance criteria
  • Own and maintain the product backlog together with the customer’s product/project manager, ensuring requirements are clearly defined and updated
  • Monitor user stories to ensure developers update required fields (estimation effort, actual effort, status, etc.)
  • Facilitate Product Backlog / Program Increment sessions with customers and internal teams
  • Plan and run Sprint Backlog sessions, Sprint reviews, and Sprint retrospectives with customer and team
  • Take ownership of overall project planning, timelines, resource allocation, and risk management, ensuring deliverables meet agreed scope, time, and budget
  • Provide team management, coordination, and support to ensure smooth delivery
  • Conduct Agile workshops and coach customers on Agile concepts, ceremonies, and best practices
  • Work with developers to create, review, and maintain test cases to ensure quality deliverables
  • Gain in-depth knowledge of the assigned project to act as Subject Matter Expert (SME) for future needs
  • Serve as an Agile coach and practitioner representing Deeeplabs to clients
  • Support pre-sales activities such as scoping sessions, proposal preparation, and client presentations

About You

  • Proven experience delivering at least 3 Agile projects in a combined Business Analyst and/or Project Manager capacity
  • Strong ability to articulate how Agile projects are planned and executed, with clear understanding of risks and mitigation strategies
  • Experience working with both business stakeholders and technical teams to translate business needs into actionable requirements
  • Added advantage if you have been involved in Data Analytics, Applications Modernisation, and/or Generative AI projects using Agile methodologies
  • Excellent communication skills, with the confidence to engage C-level stakeholders and facilitate workshops
  • Proficient in using Azure Boards or Jira for backlog management and reporting
  • Agile/Scrum certification is an advantage
  • Passion for coaching and mentoring stakeholders and team members
  • Technical background and experience with Azure or AWS is an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
We engineer technology that scales and grows with the businesses we service. We are a talent and incubation hub for ideas and new technology. We believe in making business simple and efficient.

Our team of consultants help organizations across Asia-Pacific undergo digital transformation. With a growing team of 30+ people across 2 countries, we work alongside our clients as one agile team with a shared ambition to achieve extraordinary results, outperform the competition and redefine industries. We complement our tailored, integrated expertise with a vibrant ecosystem of digital innovators to deliver better, faster, and more enduring outcomes.
postedCompany.name: DEEEPLABS PTE. LTD.
